problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
